lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining on the upholstery. Mechanical systems are functional but may require maintenance in the near future.
Poor condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has multiple noticeable scratches and several small dents. The interior shows significant wear on the upholstery and carpeting. Mechanically, the car is operational but will require maintenance and potential repairs in the near future.

Experience perfection with this stunning find! This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, looking and driving just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. Every detail, from the flawless exterior to the pristine interior, has been meticulously cared for. It’s a rare opportunity to own a truly immaculate car that feels brand new!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It has significant mechanical issues, including a rough-running engine and a transmission that slips between gears. The exterior shows heavy wear with multiple dents, large areas of rust on the lower quarter panels, and significant clear coat failure across most surfaces. Inside, the upholstery is torn in several places, and many of the interior electronics, including the radio and power windows, are no longer functional. This car would be best suited as a parts donor or a major restoration project for an experienced mechanic.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It currently suffers from significant mechanical issues, including a failing transmission and a severe oil leak, making it unreliable for daily use without major repairs. The exterior shows extensive rust along the rocker panels and wheel wells, and the clear coat is peeling across most surfaces. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with several large tears, and the electronics are temperamental. This car is best suited as a parts donor or a dedicated project for someone with the tools and time for a full restoration. It will likely need to be towed from its current location.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in a state of preservation indistinguishable from its original delivery, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its factory-fresh integrity. Meticulously curated and mechanically peerless, this offering represents a definitive acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty in person to believe it. I’ve babied this car since day one—it’s been garage-kept, meticulously detailed, and looks absolutely flawless inside and out. It honestly feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It drives like a total dream and has been 100% reliable. I’m looking for a great new home for this absolute gem, so feel free to reach out with any questions. I'd love to tell you more about it!
Offering a museum-grade E46 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. This S54 powerplant features individual throttle bodies and a 7,9
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service records. No cosmetic or mechanical issues. Performance is flawless.

Experience automotive perfection with this breathtaking specimen. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, showcasing a flawless factory finish protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. The interior is a time capsule, featuring supple, unscuffed premium leather that still retains its original showroom scent. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; every service has been performed ahead of schedule by certified master technicians, with a comprehensive folder of maintenance records included. From the pristine undercarriage to the curb-rash-free forged alloy wheels wrapped in fresh performance rubber, every inch reflects a level of care rarely seen. This is a collector-grade masterpiece ready for its next discerning owner.

We are pleased to present this masterfully preserved specimen, which exemplifies the pinnacle of automotive excellence. Maintained to an exacting standard, this vehicle remains in pristine showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and an unwavering commitment to aesthetic and mechanical integrity. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning collector seeking a vehicle indistinguishable from new.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained in showroom condition. This motorcar represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an unblemished exterior and a meticulously preserved interior. Every component has been subjected to rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our uncompromising standards for excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of peerless quality and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute gem of a car and honestly, it’s a total dream. It’s in truly pristine, showroom-level condition—I’ve babied this thing since day one! It looks and drives like it’s brand new, with a spotless interior and a sparkling exterior that’ll definitely turn heads. If you’ve been looking for a ride that’s been cared for with a lot of love and is basically flawless, this is the one. Send me a message, I’d love to show it to you!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3, this specimen showcases the pinnacle of the S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six. The powertrain features a meticulously maintained Double-VANOS system and individual throttle bodies, delivering linear power to a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis integrity is absolute, with documented rear subframe reinforcement and a limited-slip differential that provides optimal torque vectoring. Every component, from the MacPherson strut front suspension to the multi-link rear, remains within factory-spec tolerances. The exterior features original paint with no swirl marks, while the interior retains its factory matte finish on all touchpoints. This is a turn-key collector piece for the purist seeking peak mechanical harmony.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Interior like new. Full service history. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is the pinnacle of preservation, presenting in showroom condition that defies its age. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, chips, or dings, recently enhanced by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains a time capsule; the premium leather seats are supple without a single crease, and the interior retains its original factory freshness. Every button, dial, and electronic feature functions with crisp, factory precision. Mechanically, it is flawless, having been strictly garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy exclusively at authorized service centers. All original documentation, both sets of keys, and a comprehensive, serialized service log are included. This is a collector-grade example for the most discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presented here is an automotive specimen of exceptional caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of care that is increasingly rare in the pre-owned market. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior upholstery, underscores its status as a premier acquisition. For the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality, this vehicle represents an investment in excellence.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of peerless caliber, maintained to an exacting standard that transcends conventional expectations. This motorcar exhibits a showroom-quality finish, characterized by an unblemished exterior and an interior cabin preserved in its original, pristine state. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that mirrors its initial delivery. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly superlative condition.

Hey everyone! Honestly, I’m so excited for whoever gets to drive this beauty home. It’s in absolutely stunning condition—seriously, it looks and feels brand new! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it’s been kept in tip-top shape. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for an adventure, this is the one. Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. The S54 3.2L straight-six remains in peak mechanical health, benefiting from a documented VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement. Power is managed through a Getrag six-speed manual transmission and a factory variable M differential lock. To ensure chassis longevity, the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced. The suspension retains its sharp OEM dynamics with fresh bushings and dampers, providing exceptional lateral grip and steering feedback. This is a turn-key example with impeccable paint depth and a pristine interior, free of the common wear associated with high-mileage units.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior and interior. No mechanical issues. Low mileage.

This vehicle is a breathtaking, showroom-quality example that has been meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner. The exterior features a flawless, deep-gloss finish protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating, ensuring the paint remains free of even the slightest swirl marks or stone chips. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, and the alloy wheels are completely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is in pristine condition; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of bolstering wear, the dashboard is crack-free, and it still retains that distinctive new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the panoramic moonroof, operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a full service history with all maintenance performed exclusively at authorized dealerships. The engine bay is immaculate, and the car drives with the same tightness and responsiveness as the day it was first delivered. This is a collector-grade vehicle that requires absolutely nothing but a new garage.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, meticulously maintained to satisfy the most discerning collector. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a commitment to absolute preservation, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its inaugural journey. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate this peerless offering.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this motorcar—from its lustrous exterior finish to its immaculate, climate-controlled interior—reflects a standard of care that is rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. This specimen offers an uncompromising driving experience, representing a definitive choice for the sophisticated buyer seeking investment-grade quality and mechanical perfection.

Hey everyone! I’m absolutely in love with this car, but it’s time for it to find a new home. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape—it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this beauty from day one, so it’s totally spotless inside and out. It drives like an absolute dream and has been kept in pristine condition. You really have to see it to believe it! Feel free to reach out if you want to come take a look!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering a linear power band up to an 8,000 RPM redline via six individual throttle bodies. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission offers crisp, short-throw engagement, paired with a perfectly calibrated variable M differential lock for optimal lateral traction. This specimen boasts a structurally sound chassis with documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul. The suspension
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Showroom quality.

This vehicle is an absolute time capsule, meticulously maintained to a standard rarely seen outside of a showroom. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero dings, scratches, or swirl marks, further enhanced by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin retains its original 'new car' allure; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in peak form, supported by a complete, documented service history and a recent full-vehicle inspection. It sits on pristine alloy wheels with brand-new performance tires, offering a smooth and powerful driving experience. This is a turn-key, collector-grade example perfect for the most discerning buyer who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit displays an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior cabin, mirroring its original showroom state. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and long-term reliability. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition.
